detail.description:
▶ Hero's Crown Theme Mode ◀
Hero's Crown Theme Mode has been added to PUBG Mobile.
Yasnaya Polyana, Ruins, Ferry Pier, and Mylta urban areas have been transformed with a Greek-inspired style, featuring new themed buildings and structures.
Ruins and Ferry Pier are fully converted into Greek-style cities, while Yasnaya Polyana and Mylta become trial-focused zones.
Additionally, the Temple of Olympus has been added to Sky Island, where gathering embers allows you to board the Sun Chariot, battle th
